wisdom_nodes.principle: Unified Training-Serving Pipelines to prevent skew.
wisdom_nodes.description: Ensure the same data processing logic is used in both training and production environments.

wisdom_nodes.principle: Proactive Data Drift & Concept Drift Monitoring.
wisdom_nodes.description: Systems must signal performance pain before failure by monitoring distribution shifts.
Strict separation between model architecture, its configuration, and its input pre-processing.
Modify minimal parameters for task adaptation to save metabolic energy (VRAM/Compute).
Use dynamic context retrieval to reduce hallucinations and ensure data sovereignty.
